paper.title: Gaia EDR3 in 6D: Searching for unbound stars in the Galaxy

extraction.summary: Extracted 17 HVS candidates with P_ub>0.8 from Table 3: 11 Galactic hyper-runaway candidates and 6 extragalactic star candidates. No HVS candidates (none consistent with Galactic Centre origin).

method_chain.summary: Adopted Gaia EDR3 astrometry (coordinates, parallaxes, proper motions) and Gaia DR2 radial velocities for ~7.2 million bright stars.

source_refs.context: 7209831 bright stars with Gaia magnitudes G<13 have radial velocities from Gaia DR2

method_chain.summary: Selected stars with positive and precise parallaxes: varpi > 0 and sigma_varpi/varpi < 20%. Retained 6,969,738 stars.

source_refs.context: focus on subset of 6969738 stars with precise parallaxes

method_chain.summary: Applied quality cuts: RUWE < 1.4, dr2_rv_nb_transits >= 4, sigma_vGC/v_GC < 30%. Retained 5,191,458 stars.

Monte Carlo simulation: drew 5000 realizations of astrometry from multi-variate Gaussian using Gaia EDR3 correlations. Derived distances via d = 1/varpi. Reported as median with 16th/84th percentile uncertainties.

source_refs.context: MC simulation: 5000 realizations, multi-variate Gaussian, d=1/varpi

method_chain.summary: Computed Galactocentric velocities: r_sun=8.122 kpc, z_sun=25 pc, v_circ=235 km/s, solar peculiar motion [11.1,12.24,7.25] km/s. v_GC = sqrt(U^2+V^2+W^2).

source_refs.context: Solar position and motion; v_GC = sqrt(U^2+V^2+W^2)

method_chain.summary: Adopted gala MilkyWayPotential (Bovy 2015): Hernquist bulge+nucleus, Miyamoto-Nagai disk, NFW dark matter halo. Escape speed at Sun ~560 km/s.

source_refs.context: MilkyWayPotential: Hernquist bulge+nucleus, MN disk, NFW halo

method_chain.summary: Computed P_ub = fraction of MC realizations with v_GC > escape speed at star position. Selected P_ub > 0.5: 94 stars. Selected P_ub > 0.8: 17 best candidates.

source_refs.context: P_ub = ratio of MC realizations with v_GC > escape speed

method_chain.summary: Backward orbit integration for 1 Gyr with 0.1 Myr timestep using gala. Tracked Galactic disk crossings (b=0).

source_refs.context: Integrate orbit back for 1 Gyr, 0.1 Myr step

method_chain.summary: Computed P_MW = fraction of MC realizations with r_min < 25 kpc. Galactic stars: P_MW > 0.5. Extragalactic: P_MW < 0.5.

source_refs.context: P_MW = fraction of MC with r_min<25 kpc; Galactic if P_MW>0.5

method_chain.summary: Classified 17 best candidates (P_ub>0.8): 11 Galactic hyper-runaway candidates, 6 extragalactic stars. No HVS candidates.

source_refs.context: 11 Galactic; GC excluded as ejection site

inclusion_assessment.summary: Star presented in Table 3 as one of 17 clean high-velocity stars with P_ub>0.8 of being unbound from the Milky Way. Classified as Galactic hyper-runaway star candidate. P_ub=1.0, P_MW=1.0.
inclusion_assessment.confidence_reason: Explicitly listed in primary candidate table (Table 3) with P_ub>0.8. Values directly extracted from ECSV table derived from LaTeX source.

source_refs.context: 17 stars with P_ub>0.8 are our most promising candidates
P_MW = fraction of MC realizations with r_min<25 kpc

distance.description: Median distance from MC parallax inversion

proper_motion_ra.description: Gaia EDR3 proper motion in RA

proper_motion_dec.description: Gaia EDR3 proper motion in declination

total_velocity.description: Median total velocity in Galactocentric rest-frame

unbound_probability.description: Probability of being unbound (v_GC > escape speed)

zmax.description: Median Galactocentric height above disk plane

flight_time.description: Median flight time from disk crossing to observation

disk_crossing_radius.description: Median minimum crossing radius at disk crossing

ejection_velocity.description: Median ejection velocity at disk crossing

hypothesis_metrics.description: Probability of Milky Way disk origin (r_min<25 kpc)
Orbital energy per unit mass (E>0 unbound)

candidate_groups_considered.description: 94 stars with P_ub>0.5 after quality cuts. 77 with 0.5<P_ub<=0.8 not extracted.
candidate_groups_considered.reason: Paper defines best candidates as P_ub>0.8 (17 stars). Stars with P_ub in (0.5,0.8] are possible but not primary.

candidate_groups_considered.description: 12 stars with P_ub>0.5 applying Gaia EDR3 parallax zero-point correction. 5 overlap with Table 3.
candidate_groups_considered.reason: ZP-corrected catalog is a sensitivity check. Overlapping candidates already included from main table.

source_refs.context: 12 stars with P_ub>0.5 with zero point correction
